vocab.meaning: trông cực kỳ sang trọng và đắt tiền
vocab.example: A high-end sports car in a metallic cherry finish can truly look like a million dollars, turning heads wherever it goes.

vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: For many car enthusiasts, choosing the right hue is part and parcel of the overall experience of purchasing a new vehicle.

vocab.meaning: mỗi người một ý, tùy sở thích mỗi người
vocab.example: Some love neon green while others prefer charcoal grey; it’s really a case of each to their own when it comes to car aesthetics.

vocab.word: a matter of life and death
vocab.meaning: vấn đề cực kỳ quan trọng (thường dùng để nhấn mạnh tầm quan trọng)
vocab.example: While color might seem trivial, in heavy fog, having a brightly colored car can almost be a matter of life and death for visibility.

vocab.meaning: bình thường, trung tính, không có gì nổi trội
vocab.example: If you want a safe investment, choosing a middle-of-the-road color like silver is the best way to ensure it appeals to future buyers.

vocab.meaning: bộc lộ bản chất thật (trong ngữ cảnh này: bộc lộ rõ phong cách cá nhân)
vocab.example: Picking an unconventional shade like bright violet allows a driver to really show their true colors and stand out from the crowd.

vocab.word: the best of all possible worlds
vocab.meaning: sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa các ưu điểm
vocab.example: A pearl white finish offers the best of all possible worlds: it reflects heat effectively while looking incredibly sophisticated.

vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.example: Custom paint jobs with shifting pigments can cost an arm and a leg, making them a luxury only for the truly wealthy.

vocab.meaning: bất ngờ, thình lình (liên hệ đến màu sắc)
vocab.example: Sometimes a manufacturer releases a limited edition color out of the blue, which immediately becomes a collector's item.
Cars in vibrant colors like yellow or orange are few and far between on our city streets, which are dominated by greyscale tones.
